login.subtitle: Connect your Steam account, create a group with friends, and vote on tonight's game.
login.privacy: We only access your public profile and game library. No passwords stored.

groups.title: My Groups
groups.noGroupsHint: Create a group and invite your friends to get started.
groups.welcomeSubtitle: Stop arguing for 30 minutes about what to play tonight.
groups.welcomeStep1Desc: Name it after your party, squad or team.
groups.welcomeStep2Desc: Share a link — they join with Steam in 30 seconds.
groups.welcomeStep3Desc: Everyone votes, you see the common game, you play. Simple.
groups.logoutConfirmDescription: You will be redirected to the login page.

createGroup.title: Create a group
createGroup.description: Give your group a name to get started.
createGroup.label: Group name
createGroup.inviteReadyHint: Share this link — they can join in one click with Steam.

discordSetup.step1: Invite the WAWPTN bot to your Discord server.
discordSetup.disabled: The Discord bot isn't configured on this WAWPTN server.
discordSetup.step2Before: In the channel of your choice, type

joinGroup.title: Join a group
joinGroup.description: Paste the invite link you received.
joinGroup.label: Invite link

group.noCommonGames: No common games found. Make sure all members have synced their library and their Steam profile is public.
group.noCommonGamesDescription: Don't worry — it's almost always one of the reasons below.
group.noCommonGamesHint1: Private Steam profile: ask members to make it public (Steam Settings → Privacy → Game Details).
group.noCommonGamesHint2: Hidden library: the game list privacy also needs to be public.
group.noCommonGamesHint3: New members: their library may not be synced yet — hit "Re-sync" below.
group.noSearchResultsDescription: No games match your filters. Try adjusting or resetting the filters.
group.metacriticHidden_one: {{count}} game hidden by the Metacritic filter
group.metacriticHidden_other: {{count}} games hidden by the Metacritic filter
group.voteAlreadyOpen: A vote is already in progress for this group. Joining the existing vote.
group.historyUpgradeCta: Go premium to see the full history
group.voteStarted: A vote has just been started!
group.confirmVoteDescription: All group members will be notified. {{count}} common games will be put to a vote.
group.ownerCountHint: {{owned}} out of {{total}} members own this game
group.leaveConfirmDescription: You will no longer have access to this group. You will need a new invite link to rejoin.
group.deleteConfirmDescription: This action is irreversible. All members will be removed and vote history will be deleted.
group.kickConfirmDescription: {{name}} will be removed from the group and will no longer have access.
group.renameDescription: Choose a new name for the group.
group.groupRenamed: The group has been renamed to "{{name}}"
group.youWereKicked: You have been kicked from the group.
group.voteStartedOthers: A vote has been started for other players
group.voteScheduled: A gaming night has been scheduled for {{date}}!
group.autoVoteHint: Automatically creates a vote at the configured time
group.autoVotePlaceholder: Pick a schedule or type a cron expression
group.moreFiltersDescription: Fine-tune the list with advanced criteria.
group.autoVotePresetsEmpty: No suggestions. You can still type a custom cron expression.
group.discordBannerTitle: Link a Discord channel to this group
group.discordBannerHint: Announcements and votes will be posted automatically in the channel you pick.

tonightPick.emptyDescription: Once your libraries are synced, we'll surface a tailored pick for tonight.
tonightPick.voteInProgressDescription: Join your friends to cast your pick and reveal tonight's game.
tonightPick.voteScheduledDescription: A vote has already been scheduled in this group. Open it to see the details.

voteSetup.title: Who's playing tonight?
voteSetup.description: Select the players participating in tonight's session.
voteSetup.gameSelectionHint: {{total}} games in common available for selection
voteSetup.scheduleDateLabel: Date and time of the gaming night
voteSetup.scheduleHint: The vote will automatically close at this time.

randomPick.title: Random pick
randomPick.onlyOneGame: Only one common game, re-roll not available.
randomPick.keyboardHint: Press Space or Enter to re-roll

vote.title: Vote
vote.noWinnerDescription: Nobody agreed on a game. Start a new round to try again.
vote.launchTimeoutDescription: If Steam isn't responding, we can rematch on another game.
vote.waiting: Waiting for others... {{done}} out of {{total}} voted
vote.selectGamesHint: Select the games you want to play from {{count}} games in common
vote.notParticipant: You are not a participant in this voting session.
vote.noActiveSessionDescription: There is no active voting session right now. Head back to the group to start one.

join.loginPrompt: Sign in with Steam to join the group.

invite.shareLink: Share this link with your friends:
invite.discordMessage: Join our group on WAWPTN! Connect with Steam and vote for tonight's game!

discordLink.title: Link your Discord account
discordLink.loginPrompt: Sign in with Steam to link your Discord account.
discordLink.linkedDescription: Your Discord account ({{username}}) is now linked to WAWPTN.
discordLink.noCode: No link code found in the URL.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.accountTaken: This account is already linked to another user.
profile.noLibraryApi: This platform does not provide an API to sync the game library.
profile.discordLinkInstructions: Open Discord and run /wawptn-link in a server where the bot is installed to get a code, then paste it on the link page.

landing.headline: What are we playing tonight?
landing.subheadline: Connect your Steam account, gather your squad, and let the vote settle it. No more thirty-minute negotiations before every session.
landing.ctaSubtext: 100% free · No password · Ready in 30 seconds
landing.feature1Desc: Share one invite link and you're set. Friends join the group and their Steam, Epic, and GOG libraries sync in seconds.
landing.feature2Desc: Everyone weighs in on the games you share. Results update in real time, and tonight's pick emerges right before your eyes.
landing.feature3Desc: The winning game appears with its cover art and a button to launch it straight in Steam. No more excuses — game on.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start with no credit card. Upgrade to Premium the day you want more.
landing.freeFeature5: 10 most recent vote sessions in history

pwa.installPromptDescription: Get faster access from your home screen.

share.linkCopiedDiscord: Link copied — ready to paste in Discord!
